textByHashes.e99ff659c291b92145f282804cfc18f46633ebda: Aha! You made it. Well done, old sausage!
textByHashes.2d6341f4522b4a32e1a7e4cc4eb476058a1ce2bf: Indeed I do. Indeed I do.
textByHashes.483c6681c9d1c0b740acd02431dbe7e8278fa101: Ah! Straight to the point, eh, what? Good show old carrot, good show. Now let me explain.
textByHashes.68ac47b53c819656ae25a829bab331b9e8c1d48d: I'm in a bit of a fix right now. You see, the princess down there has this horrible relative who happens to be a witch.
textByHashes.d5b8bb05bd45485e2d92e319414a6765ce0b2c00: Stepmother? Ho! Good lord, no. No king in his right mind would marry a hag like that! No, this is her evil second-cousin, twice-removed.
textByHashes.49958aa1695c4f2b64a649645c6ddd22ba3cbbfc: Right, well a young gnome friend of mine by the name of Winkin recently disappeared whilst delivering ogleroots to the market in Draynor.
textByHashes.2d99cfcd9dd9f3fd4d868e5fe9a29d06e0bb82dc: I don't know exactly, but someone told me he was last seen talking to a witch before he disappeared.
textByHashes.5b3b7820c45b603fccc6c9ca29a525d150c71bdb: My investigations brought me to our friend the princess down there, old pinata. She's related to this witch, as I mentioned. I was...you know...showing a bit of interest in her to get her to give me information.
textByHashes.f154ba3c646ceda09325c0df8ae3e9598d770658: She invited me back to her 'tower', saying she would tell me all I wanted to know, and then as I walked in the door she slammed it shut behind me.
textByHashes.e01d4fc95aed6501db766c962718a38d78f9effc: Yes, indeed! Rude indeed! Then, as I was hammering on the door I heard a hissing sound and smelt something strange. The next thing I remember is waking up to find my armour gone!
textByHashes.74cbec4ab55ece62851a74c00ec47838f431fcab: That wench must have taken it!
textByHashes.469d33a84114b900e82c9c2cd1c69d2da68e30f0: Excellent! Good show, old spice! Off you go then.
textByHashes.a5ffb776e6718d15c6e401e900a398bac0db2b86: Ahh, you're back. Have you spoken to the princess yet, old mushroom?
textByHashes.fc0ffa1e67c1eaf61f9435f8b64b3901b366e182: Right you are then, old chestnut.
textByHashes.94caedca673cb645f626c4dcc62b6240eab6b113: Ah! , old pantaloons! Good to see you, good to see you. What news?
textByHashes.3606c3e175b4e52e4858f2d3dfff26b709f6665c: Princess Marzipan, eh? What a mouthful.
textByHashes.90e3acc67c18fd6a7847588d30d461dc58450c35: Ah, I see. Good show. Say, did you find out anything about my missing friend?
textByHashes.9e29a9f3adc2808248cc473dfaf2601ea2df7814: Good gods! That's awful! I won't have all this kidnapping nonsense! And to think we're supposed to be a civilised land!
textByHashes.51af2d19b8f00486addb5103c0924d20f4b18d38: I'll think of something. In the meantime, you still need to get me out of here. Maybe you should see if Miazrqa is ready to let me out.
textByHashes.7679fec0ddb9014ac40b27d99d283e46fe9fe5c4: By Saradomin! My armour was on the stairs up there!
textByHashes.2549db8424fe660679014a0f3140279264d21dfe: Aha! Sweet freedom! It's good to be alive, old sweet shop! Thank you for freeing me, .
textByHashes.cb2d8a83317abb8c0174285592fab2c944d36da7: Thank you, . You've done a great service for me and all the dwarves and gnomes.
textByHashes.efa9201ffe1c2df4aaa09e302abf380f3557d09a: Hah! Don't fret, old penny whistle! It's still here. The front of my armour was specially crafted to allow my beard to fold up inside. Do you see?
textByHashes.b5871af94639cb6e1eb8dadba59f0a64868140d5: Indeed it is, old cheese! Now allow me to reward you in some way. All I have is my armour, but you are welcome to take any piece of it that you wish.
textByHashes.e07b6fb31de0cc77de61628634857a17ef9a5a9e: Of course, of course. Here you go, old pumpkin.
textByHashes.c880888484b8e26a1b64422ad32a800feaa435c9: Thanks to you I can carry on my investigations. Good show, old brussels sprout!
textByHashes.92a07d34499a28fdd16bf61708a5dd5644d01565: I'm not surprised, old kiwi. It's a pretty ghastly business with all this kidnapping gnomes and dwarves.
textByHashes.1f220277f668a5f902479a946cadb22a28c52662: Really? That's just fantastic! You are certainly full of surprises, . Good show!
textByHashes.25f581defd5d51f391a88ac5d85c03f93a4a1f5b: And to you, my friend. And to you.
textByHashes.185b169ed1c690f7f830dc1cea292333fe720a18: Hello again, old cheesecake! Wonderful to see you.
textByHashes.aa56f632c3b58a6d0714cb6df6c65b8ae18ea022: Thanks to you freeing me, very well! I have much more to do of course, but now I am free, I can continue where I left off.
textByHashes.c6eb4552661ca0618c81ce9f10b845ce34ddc0de: You might be in luck, old bellybutton fluff - I have made replacements. You could have one for 60,000 coins - for the materials, you understand.
textByHashes.11f20caf9bb5e637e0f66421596b911773e9df00: No problem! Come back and see me any time, old garters.
